steps.title: Identify what the question needs
steps.content: The goal is to emphasize the size of Tepeapulco. Of the five notes, only one provides a size measurement: "Tepeapulco covers an area of roughly 243 km²." The correct answer must include that figure; any choice without it cannot emphasize size.

steps.title: Eliminate the choices
steps.content:
• Choice A — Providing water treatment is just one example of the public services that municipalities provide.: Discusses municipal services. Does not mention Tepeapulco or its size at all. ✗
  • Choice B — Tepeapulco—a governmental region in the state of Hidalgo, Mexico—provides many public services to its residents.: Describes what Tepeapulco does, not how large it is. No size measurement included. ✗
  • Choice C — Tepeapulco is one of 84 governmental regions, known as municipalities, across Hidalgo.: Gives count context (84 municipalities) but conveys no area or size measurement for Tepeapulco itself. ✗
  • Choice D — The municipality of Tepeapulco in Hidalgo, Mexico, covers an area of roughly 243 km².: Directly states Tepeapulco's area in km², which is the only note that quantifies its size. ✓
D is correct.
